categories.label: Food
categories.desc: Caribbean-inspired plates built for sharing. Coconut shrimp, jerk chicken, the Coconut Club Burger, and a rotating selection of seasonal plates.
categories.alt: Miss B's Coconut Club food menu Mission Beach San Diego

categories.label: Cocktails
categories.desc: Tropical craft cocktails from our full bar program. The Caribe Welcome, Mango Guava Spritz, Rum Cannonball, and 24 flamingo draft taps.
categories.alt: Miss B's Coconut Club craft cocktails Mission Beach San Diego

categories.label: Brunch
categories.desc: Weekend brunch every Saturday and Sunday from 10am to 3pm. Bottomless mimosas, morning cocktails, and brunch plates worth getting out of bed for.
categories.alt: Miss B's Coconut Club brunch Mission Beach San Diego

items.name: Breakfast Burrito
items.description: Scrambled eggs, sofrito, bell peppers, onions, bacon, fries, beer cheese. Choice of meat.
items.alt: Breakfast burrito at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Breakfast Sandwich
items.description: Scrambled eggs, gruyere cheese, bacon, cilantro aioli, brioche roll. Served with house potatoes.
items.alt: Breakfast sandwich at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Breakfast Side Plate
items.description: Choice of 3 eggs your way, bacon, toast, fruit.
items.alt: Breakfast side plate at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Breakfast Tacos
items.description: Scrambled eggs or grilled chicken, mojo pulled pork, vegan sausage, or carne asada. Topped with chimichurri.
items.alt: Breakfast tacos at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Coco Acai Bowl
items.description: Fresh acai bowl with tropical coconut toppings.
items.alt: Coco acai bowl at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Easy B's Breakfast
items.description: Eggs, bacon, toast, breakfast potatoes, salad. Make vegetarian with Tropi-sausage.
items.alt: Easy B's breakfast at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: French Toast
items.description: Miss B's house rum blend, toasted coconut. Served with tropical fruit, powdered sugar and maple syrup.
items.alt: French toast at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Pete's Biscuits and Gravy
items.description: House-made biscuits and gravy.
items.alt: Pete's biscuits and gravy at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: The B's Muffin
items.description: Miss B's take on the classic egg muffin.
items.alt: The B's muffin at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Caribbean BBQ Chicken Salad
items.description: Grilled chicken in house Caribbean BBQ sauce, romaine lettuce, fresh cucumber, red onion, pickled daikon, cherry tomatoes.
items.alt: Caribbean BBQ chicken salad at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Chicken Sandwich
items.description: Grilled or crispy chicken sandwich with Miss B's house sauce.
items.alt: Chicken sandwich at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Chips and Salsa
items.description: Seasoned tortilla chips with house salsa.
items.alt: Chips and salsa at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Club Burger
items.description: All-natural 1/3 lb with LTO, bread and butter pickles, special garlic cilantro aioli, gruyere cheese.
items.alt: Club burger at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Coconut Shrimp
items.description: Coconut battered organic shrimp. Served with your choice of dipping sauce.
items.alt: Coconut shrimp at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: El Cubano Sandwich
items.description: Seasoned pork, chicken, gruyere, tilapia, butter pickles, spiced mustard, roasted garlic cilantro aioli.
items.alt: El Cubano sandwich at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Island Salad
items.description: Fresh romaine and spring mix, pickled radishes, bell peppers, cucumber, pineapple agua, lemon. Served with chimichurri dressing.
items.alt: Island salad at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Jerk Chicken Wrap
items.description: Grilled chicken, guacamole, tomato, red onion, mango chutney, grilled in a spinach tortilla.
items.alt: Jerk chicken wrap at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Mojo Pulled Pork Fries
items.description: Seasoned fries, mojo roasted pulled pork, Jamaican flavor cheese.
items.alt: Mojo pulled pork fries at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Petite Burger
items.description: All-natural 1/3 lb Angus beef with LTO, bread and butter pickles, special mustard, garlic cilantro sauce, choice of cheese. Served on toasted brioche bun.
items.alt: Petite burger at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Vegetarian Jackfruit Wrap
items.description: Rich seasoned jackfruit, spring mix, pineapple mango sauce, tomatoes and mango chutney wrapped in a spinach tortilla.
items.alt: Vegetarian jackfruit wrap at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Wings
items.description: 6 seasoned jerk cabbage wings. Served with your choice of two house sauces.
items.alt: Wings at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Empanadas
items.description: House-made empanadas.
items.alt: Empanadas at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Fish & Chips
items.description: Tempura battered white fish, cilantro citrus slaw, house tartar sauce, lemon. Served with seasoned fries.
items.alt: Fish and chips at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Fisherman's Catch
items.description: Choice of grilled white fish, agave demi, crema, pico de gallo, crispy cheese, hot box seasoning.
items.alt: Fisherman's catch at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Miss B's Favorites (2 Tacos)
items.description: Choice of chicken, carne asada, mojo pulled pork, or jackfruit. Served with agave demi, crema, pico de gallo.
items.alt: Miss B's favorite tacos at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Polar Bowl
items.description: Coconut-infused rice, fresh cucumber, fresh avocado, fresh tomatoes, crispy cheese, shrimp, salmon, wonton croutons, sriracha.
items.alt: Polar bowl at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Surf and Turf
items.description: Carne asada and shrimp, agave demi, pico de gallo, crispy cheese.
items.alt: Surf and turf at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Caribe Welcome
items.description: The Miss B's signature cocktail. A tropical rum blend built for the Mission Beach afternoon.
items.alt: Caribe Welcome cocktail at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Mango Guava Spritz
items.description: Light, tropical, and built for brunch. The morning order at Miss B's.
items.alt: Mango Guava Spritz cocktail at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Rum Cannonball
items.description: A bold rum cocktail — one of the signatures from the 24 copper flamingo tap program.
items.alt: Rum Cannonball cocktail at Miss B's Coconut Club

items.name: Bottomless Mimosas
items.description: Available during weekend brunch. The most efficient path to a perfect Saturday morning.
items.alt: Bottomless mimosas at Miss B's Coconut Club
